overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a walk through the historic city of Saint Denis. The camera travels along a raised stone walkway with ornate columns, descends to cobblestone street level, passes a horse-drawn carriage and tram, and continues through a residential district lined with historic mansions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with ornate columns and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered stone walkway beside a historic building

notable_agents.action: man in period clothing leaning against the stone building wall
group of pedestrians walking along the walkway toward the camera

entered.detail: historic stone building with tall arched columns and weathered facade
decorative cast iron bench with intricate patterns
large three-story pink brick mansion with green shutters and balconies

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered stone walkway adjacent to a historic building with tall columns. Pedestrians in period clothing walk along the path, and ornate white benches line the right side. The distinctive pink brick mansion is visible in the distance.

events.description: begins descending the stone staircase from the raised walkway to street level

agents.ego_description: approaching and descending the stone stairs at the end of the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: man and woman standing near the building wall conversing

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with decorative balustrade leading down to street
ornate black cast iron street lamp

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the walkway and approaches a wide stone staircase. Two NPCs stand near the building wall as the camera begins descending the stairs, transitioning from the covered walkway to the open street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street intersection with tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by from left to right across the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving along the cobblestone street

entered.detail: two-story house with green shutters and flower boxes
wooden tram car on tracks in the distance
grand white mansion with tall columns at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera moves along cobblestone streets with visible tram tracks. A horse-drawn carriage passes by from left to right, and a grand white columned mansion stands at the end of the street. A wooden tram is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone residential street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward the distant white mansion

entered.detail: the distinctive pink mansion reappears on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the cobblestone street with tram tracks running down the center. The pink brick mansion comes back into view on the left, while the white columned mansion grows larger ahead. The street is lined with historic homes and mature trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered architectural walkway down into the bustling, open streets of a historic city. It begins by gliding along a covered stone path lined with ornate white benches and pedestrians in period clothing, with a pink brick mansion visible in the distance. As the camera approaches a wide stone staircase, it descends from the elevated walkway to the street level below, passing NPCs stationed against the building wall. The scene then opens onto cobblestone streets embedded with tram tracks, where a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path and a wooden tram appears in the distance. Finally, the camera continues forward through a residential district of mature trees and historic homes, moving past the pink brick mansion on the left as a grand white columned mansion grows larger ahead.
